posts.text:
You are made in India.


Alp Pouch (@alppouch)

Ben Shapiro Declares War on ALP

"So the question now is, whether he (Tucker) was dropped on his head as an adult." 

"I highly recommend before anyone uses as much ALP as Tucker is using that they take a look at the outcome of that kind of ALP use."

"We lack for verbiage to describe this kind of nincompoopery."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/alppouch/status/2031418773421641954#m

On the show today:

Two radical Muslims attack two targets on the same day – just the latest terror attack in a wave of them on American soil;

we talk about what can be done; and we ask whether America has the will to outlast Iran’s terrorist regime?

Watch here: piped.video/watch?v=dBewatbI…

Piers Morgan (@piersmorgan)

‼️ UPDATE: My new interview with @TuckerCarlson drops tonight. It’s revealing, combative, funny, and unusually, I agreed with most of what he said. We also discussed Little Benji @benshapiro who’s going to hate it. (Expect more squealing!)
Drops tonight on @PiersUncensored …





— https://nitter.net/piersmorgan/status/2032428606085820860#m

Never. Stop. Clickwhoring.


Piers Morgan (@piersmorgan)

I’ll reply to Little Benji’s latest hissy-fit on tomorrow’s ⁦@PiersUncensored⁩ .. with a special guest specially booked to make him throw another toddler tantrum.





— https://nitter.net/piersmorgan/status/2032181596506530231#m

Don’t worry, Megyn. I’d never ask you to protect me. You won’t even protect Charlie Kirk’s widow from the monster accusing her of murdering Charlie.


Megyn Kelly (@megynkelly)

Poor little Ben - and I do mean little - desperate for me to protect him. Can you imagine being this emasculated? Sad.



— https://nitter.net/megynkelly/status/2032196856306880641#m

.@megynkelly is a coward.

@piersmorgan is a clickwhore.

None of that has anything to do with Israel or Jews. And criticism isn’t censorship.

Stop with your whiny Jussie Smollett fake victim routine.

Video

On the show today:

Are you suffering from loss of sleep, ideological bloat, and brain cramps over the war in Iran? You may have Iran Propaganda Syndrome…

and you may have caught it from your favorite podcaster or Democratic politician. We’ll break it all down.

Watch here: piped.video/watch?v=c5FXdkFo…
We're gonna brow-beat this meme to death.

Today on the show:

Yes, there will be boots on the ground... they just won't be ours; 

and we give you the deep dive on our erstwhile Kurdish allies, who may be preparing to take on the IRGC.

Watch here: piped.video/watch?v=rtz1ihfe…

Saying America is the worst terrorist organization in the world means you hate America.

Video

On the show today: 

As Iran takes heavy body blows from the US-Israeli combined operation, 

Iran tries to activate its American friends; we discuss just why the US went active against Iran now; 

and we talk about whether America is safer.

Watch here: 
piped.video/watch?v=4PDyF-2t…

Today on the show I explain the FIND OUT part of Iran's f*cking around.

Watch here: piped.video/watch?v=cKRo12wb…
